title: Business Breakfast | Stock/Share Market News | 23rd February 2026 || TV5 Money Live

recommendations.note: Operated counter; don't buy fresh at this price
recommendations.detail: He called it an operated counter with more noise than performance, hard to comment on. It disappointed badly versus its segment. If it is only a small rally, exit; no one should buy fresh at this price. After the rights issue is done, look at the price and quarterly performance before deciding.

recommendations.note: Buy as market consolidates, with a strict stop loss near 500
recommendations.detail: Its earlier rise was on data-center hype; it went above 700 then corrected, and now shows some stability. Last result commentary said projects are on track, bringing renewed buying interest. It dipped below 500 over three months and has risen to about 550; as the market consolidates one can buy, but keep a strict stop loss around 500.

Not a great stock; it moves in a 30-40 range on and off every 3-4 months, but has fallen continuously since the last quarter's result, going below 75 and bottoming near 87-90. Top line rose but bottom line did not, and raw-material/commodity costs are likely to rise. He would avoid it and exit on rallies.
